notes: Source: Sony VPL service / RS232 protocol references (covers VPL-CH/CW/FH/PHZ/PX/VW/HW series).
Wire: D-Sub 9-pin cross-over. 38400 8E1 (8 data bits, EVEN parity, 1 stop bit). Note this is unusual — most projectors are 8N1.
Packet format: A9 17 <cmd-hi> <cmd-lo> <data-hi> <data-lo> 3F 9A (8 bytes). The leading A9 + trailing 9A frame the SIRCS-encoded payload. 3F is the checksum/category byte.

Only power_on / power_off are universally documented across forums; other commands (HDMI/mute/menu) vary by VPL model line and are deliberately omitted to avoid sending model-specific codes that may misbehave on other units.
For full command sets, request the model-specific 'RS-232C Protocol Manual' from Sony Professional support.
